'''ân-g-k-r''' ('''kanagkeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaunt|jaunt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jaunt|jaunt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-g-k-r
|-
! Lemma
| kanagkeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinagkeroko|thinagkeroko]] || [[word:jinagkeroko|jinagkeroko]] || [[word:shinagkeroko|shinagkeroko]] || [[word:kinagkeroko|kinagkeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunagkeroko|thuthunagkeroko]] || [[word:jujunagkeroko|jujunagkeroko]] || [[word:shushunagkeroko|shushunagkeroko]] || [[word:kukunagkeroko|kukunagkeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunagkeroko|thunagkeroko]] || [[word:junagkeroko|junagkeroko]] || [[word:shunagkeroko|shunagkeroko]] || [[word:kunagkeroko|kunagkeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunagkeroko|thunagkeroko]] || [[word:junagkeroko|junagkeroko]] || [[word:shunagkeroko|shunagkeroko]] || [[word:kunagkeroko|kunagkeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenagkeroko|thenagkeroko]] || [[word:jenagkeroko|jenagkeroko]] || [[word:shenagkeroko|shenagkeroko]] || [[word:kenagkeroko|kenagkeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonagkeroko|thothonagkeroko]] || [[word:jojonagkeroko|jojonagkeroko]] || [[word:shoshonagkeroko|shoshonagkeroko]] || [[word:kokonagkeroko|kokonagkeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonagkeroko|thonagkeroko]] || [[word:jonagkeroko|jonagkeroko]] || [[word:shonagkeroko|shonagkeroko]] || [[word:konagkeroko|konagkeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonagkeroko|thonagkeroko]] || [[word:jonagkeroko|jonagkeroko]] || [[word:shonagkeroko|shonagkeroko]] || [[word:konagkeroko|konagkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnagkeroko|thĂŠnagkeroko]] || [[word:jĂŠnagkeroko|jĂŠnagkeroko]] || [[word:shĂŠnagkeroko|shĂŠnagkeroko]] || [[word:kĂŠnagkeroko|kĂŠnagkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanagkeroko|thathanagkeroko]] || [[word:jajanagkeroko|jajanagkeroko]] || [[word:shashanagkeroko|shashanagkeroko]] || [[word:kakanagkeroko|kakanagkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanagkeroko|thanagkeroko]] || [[word:janagkeroko|janagkeroko]] || [[word:shanagkeroko|shanagkeroko]] || [[word:kanagkeroko|kanagkeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanagkeroko|thanagkeroko]] || [[word:janagkeroko|janagkeroko]] || [[word:shanagkeroko|shanagkeroko]] || [[word:kanagkeroko|kanagkeroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
